notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 11 CVEs: CVE-2024-56690, CVE-2025-21795, CVE-2025-37819, CVE-2025-37789, CVE-2023-53034, and 6 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
